general_feedback: Both @return tags were filled in accurately and concisely. The newBuilder @return correctly describes the reusable builder (consistent with the surrounding 'multiple related results' Scaladoc) and types it as `HashSet[A]`. The insertElement @return precisely describes the array's new length (`as.length + 1`) and the insertion position (`ix`), matching the implementation. Both follow Scaladoc conventions: lowercase start, backticks around code references, single clear sentence.
